title: Legal entity/Individual: Fimarge, Societat Financera d’Inversió, SA
text:
Status: Unappealable

Penalty imposed on Fimarge, Societat Financera d’Inversió, SA in the amount of 12,000 euros (following the application of a 40% reduction to the initially proposed penalty of 20,000 euros , in accordance with Article 8.3 of Law on the disciplinary regime of the financial system of 27 November 1997 ( LRRD )). The penalty is set out in Article 18.2 of LRRD and results from the commission of two serious infringements , classified under Article 16 n) and w) of the same regulation, due to non-compliance with the regulations relating to investor protection and the absence or non-application of measures or policies for managing conflicts of interest, in accordance with the provisions of Law 7/2024, of 27 May, on the organisation and functioning of entities operating in the financial system and market abuse.

title: Individual: Mr. Higini Cierco Noguer
text:
Status: Final under the administrative process

A financial sanction in the amount of 75.126,51 euros in addition to the permanent suspension from exercising any administrative or general management positions, in law or in fact, imposed for the commission of a very serious offence under article 18.1 b of Law regulating the financial system’s disciplinary regime , in its version in force until March 2015. Currently set out in Article 15.g (15.f), A financial sanction in the amount of 37.563,26 euros in addition to a suspension for a period of 10 years from exercising any administrative or general management positions, in law or in fact, imposed for the commission of a serious offence under article 18.2 b of Law regulating the financial system’s disciplinary regime , in its version in force until March 2015. Currently set out in Article 16.c (16.d), A financial sanction in the amount of 37.563,26 euros in addition to a suspension for a period of 10 years from exercising any administrative or general management positions, in law or in fact, imposed for the commission of a serious offence under article 18.2 b of Law regulating the financial system’s disciplinary regime , in its version in force until March 2015. Currently set out in Article 16.g (16.h).
status: Status: Final under the administrative process

title: Legal entity/Individual: Fimarge, Societat Financera d’Inversió, SA
text:
Status: Unappealable

Penalty imposed on Fimarge, Societat Financera d’Inversió, SA amounting to 10.000 euros, pursuant to Article 34 of Law 24/2022, of 30 June, on the digital representation of assets through the use of cryptography and distributed ledger technology and blockchain , for the commission of a serious infringement, as is prescribed in letter d) of section 2.2 of Article 33 of the aforementioned law, for carrying out acts or operations without the required authorisation.

title: Legal entity/Individual: Crèdit Andorrà, SA
text:
Status: Unappealable

Penalty imposed on the bank Crèdit Andorrà, SA, amounting to 135.029,12 euros (after a reduction of a 40% on the penalty of 225.048,53 euros proposed by the AFA in accordance with Article 8.3 of the L aw regulating the financial system’s disciplinary regime - LRRD- ) pursuant to Article 18, paragraph 2, of the LRRD for the commission of a serious infringement of Article 16 a) of the referred law, for carrying out acts or operations without the required authorisation.
